items.prompt: For long farm runs, the better default is often…
choices: FST for smaller files at scale
Only printf in C++ with no waves
items.explain: FST scales better for long runs.

items.prompt: For quick debug on a tiny design, VCD is…

choices: Compile flags and host dump calls actually record cycles
You only type a filename in a comment
items.explain: Recording requires active dump, not just naming.

items.prompt: Choosing FST without enabling the matching trace-fst compile path can yield broken or empty results.
items.explain: Format choice and compile flags must align.
